the_house.text: First hand is drawn face down

the_wheel.name: The Wheel
the_wheel.text: in 7 cards get drawn face down

the_arm.name: The Arm
the_arm.text: Decrease level of played poker hand

the_fish.name: The Fish
the_fish.text: Cards drawn face down after each hand played

the_eye.name: The Eye
the_eye.text: No repeat hand types this round

the_mouth.name: The Mouth
the_mouth.text: Play only 1 hand type this round

the_serpent.name: The Serpent
the_serpent.text: After Play or Discard, always draw 3 cards

the_pillar.name: The Pillar
the_pillar.text: Cards played previously this Ante are debuffed

the_flint.name: The Flint
the_flint.text: Base Chips and Mult are halved

the_mark.name: The Mark
the_mark.text: All face cards are drawn face down

the_final_acorn.name: Amber Acorn
the_final_acorn.text: Flips and shuffles all Joker cards

the_final_heart.name: Crimson Heart
the_final_heart.text: One random Joker disabled every hand

the_final_leaf.name: Verdant Leaf
the_final_leaf.text: All cards debuffed until 1 Joker sold
